---
title: "Web Technology"
subtitle: "BMC201 • MCA Semester 2 • 2025-26"
details: |
  Prashant Kumar Nag<br>Galgotias College of Engineering & Technology
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    template-partials:
      - html/home/title-block.html
course-logo: /files/favicon-512.png
---

::: {.home}
## Instructor & Course

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](files/nagpk.jpg){width="180"}
:::

::: {.column width="75%"}
- [Mr. Prashant Kumar Nag](https://prashantnag.com)
- Email: [prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu](mailto:prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu)
- Department: Department of Computer Applications
- Institution: Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology
- Course: Web Technology (BMC201)
- Program: MCA Semester 2 (2025-26)
:::

::::

## Course Overview

This course introduces modern web development with both front-end and back-end technologies. You will learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSP/Servlets, Spring, and REST APIs through lectures, labs, and assignments.

## What You Will Learn

- Build responsive web pages using HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap.
- Create interactive UI behavior with JavaScript and DOM manipulation.
- Develop server-side applications using JSP, Servlets, and Spring Boot.
- Work with databases and web server deployment basics.
- Apply web standards, architecture principles, and debugging practices.


## Getting Help

- Email: [prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu](mailto:prashantkumar.nag@galgotiacollege.edu)
- Office: Room A06, Department of Computer Applications, Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology
- Typical response time: 24-48 hours on weekdays

:::
